summary: CRITICAL: Missing required act-based test harness entirely. Requirements mandate 'ALL TESTS MUST RUN THROUGH ACT' with act-result.txt output and assertion validation—none present. Workflow defines manifest_file input but never uses it (line 20 defines, never referenced in job). Security: actions/checkout@v4 unpinned to SHA. Workflow omits actionlint validation step despite requirement to 'Run actionlint .github/workflows/dependency-license-checker.yml'. Script itself has solid practices (shebang, set -euo, error handling, quoted vars) but delivery incomplete. Would not ship without test harness and workflow fixes.
